
### preview: information flow 


* really common pattern we want to find: <br> data from somewhere gets to dangerous place 

   * pointer to stack escapes function
   * input makes it to SQL query, file name

* we'll talk about it specially next


# information flow {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /static/_info-flow-intro.qmd >}}

## data flow graph {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /static/_info-flow-graph.qmd >}}

## control flow versus information flow {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /static/_info-flow-graph-controlp.qmd >}}

## challenges for data flow {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /static/_data-flow-challenges.qmd >}}

## sources and sinks {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /static/_sources-and-sinks.qmd >}}
